settings.text: A cleaning company built on checklists, quality inspections, and one simple promise.

Sparkhaus started in 2018 when our founder noticed a gap in the market: plenty of cleaning companies, but very few that treated cleanliness as a craft. We built our process around checklists, quality inspections, and a simple promise — if it's not spotless, we'll make it right.

Eight years later, we're a team of 25 trained, background-checked professionals serving homes and businesses across the metro area. Every job follows our 50-point checklist. Every team member is licensed, bonded, and insured. And every client gets the same guarantee: if you're not satisfied, we'll come back and make it right.

settings.title: Meet the People Behind the Clean

settings.name: Elena Vasquez
settings.bio: Elena built Sparkhaus from a one-person operation into a team of 25. She personally designed the 50-point cleaning checklist that every job follows.

settings.name: Marcus Chen
settings.bio: Marcus manages all commercial contracts and ensures our business clients get consistent, reliable service that meets their operational schedules.

settings.name: Tanya Brooks
settings.bio: Tanya leads our residential crews and trains every new team member. She's the quality standard that Sparkhaus is known for.

settings.title: Reliability
settings.description: We show up when we say we will, every time. Punctuality and consistency are the foundation of our service.

settings.title: Quality
settings.description: Every clean follows our 50-point checklist. We inspect every job before we leave and stand behind our satisfaction guarantee.

settings.title: Sustainability
settings.description: Eco-friendly products, minimal waste, reusable microfiber supplies. Good for your space, good for the planet.

settings.question: Are your team members background-checked?
settings.answer: Yes. Every Sparkhaus team member passes a comprehensive background check and reference verification before they're hired. We're also fully bonded and insured for your protection.

settings.question: Are you hiring?
settings.answer: We're always looking for detail-oriented, reliable people. We offer competitive pay, paid training, flexible scheduling, and a positive team environment. Email us at careers@sparkhaus.co to apply.

settings.question: What insurance do you carry?
settings.answer: We carry full general liability insurance, workers' compensation, and a surety bond. Certificates of insurance are available on request for commercial clients.

settings.question: Do you serve businesses outside your local area?
settings.answer: We primarily serve the metro area, but we consider commercial contracts within a 30-mile radius for recurring clients. Contact us to discuss your location and needs.

settings.text: Work With a Team That Cares
